ddls:
CREATE TABLE "circuits" (
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digital circuit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the digital circuit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the digital circuit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the circuit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the circuit was created */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the circuit */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the circuit */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the circuit was last modified */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the circuit is shared with other users */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the circuit is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., AND gate, OR gate, NOT gate) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the component */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the component */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component was last modified */,
  "is_reusable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the component can be reused in multiple circuits */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Path to an icon representing the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit the connection belongs to */,
  "component1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first component in the connection */,
  "component2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second component in the connection */,
  "input_output" TEXT /* Whether the connection is an input or output */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the connection */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the connection */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the connection was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the connection is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_component2_id FOREIGN KEY ("component2_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_component1_id FOREIGN KEY ("component1_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit being simulated */,
  "input_values" TEXT /* Input values for the simulation */,
  "output_values" TEXT /* Output values for the simulation */,
  "simulated_at" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the simulation */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the simulation */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the simulation was last modified */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., real-time, step-by-step) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the operation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., AND, OR, NOT) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the operation */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the operation */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the operation was last modified */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Path to an icon representing the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "truth_tables" (
  "truth_table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truth table */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the truth table belongs to */,
  "inputs" TEXT /* Input values for the truth table */,
  "outputs" TEXT /* Output values for the truth table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the truth table */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the truth table */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the truth table was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("truth_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_components" (
  "operation_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation-component pair */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the pair */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the pair */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pair was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_components_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circuit_operations" (
  "circuit_operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit-operation pair */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the pair */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the pair */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pair was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circuit_operations_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circuit_operations_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_truth_tables" (
  "operation_truth_table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation-truth table pair */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation */,
  "truth_table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truth table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the pair */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the pair */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pair was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_truth_table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_truth_tables_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_truth_tables_truth_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("truth_table_id") REFERENCES truth_tables ("truth_table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_connections" (
  "component_connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component-connection pair */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connection */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the pair */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the pair */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pair was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_connections_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES connections ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_connections_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "simulation_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the simulation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the result */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the result */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the result was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_circuits" (
  "user_circuit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-circuit pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the pair */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the pair */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pair was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_circuit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_circuits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_circuits_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)
